title: Act III - The Man Who Died Twice
summary: Ada's leak triggers OPI pursuit. The hunt for Potter turns into a race where each clue costs credibility, safety, and trust.

narrative.newInfo: OPI confirms the paradigm is known and actively managed.
narrative.dripHook: Potter is alive, but contact may expose him and collapse the window.
narrative.payoffDelivered: Potter trail shifts from theory to physical mission.
narrative.beautyHooks: Institutional pressure forces epistemic theory into embodied risk.
